items.caption: A slide from a presentation on chemical urinalysis. it features two photographs of a person performing a urinalysis test. the person is wearing gloves and is using a test strip to analyze a sample of urine. the test strip is being dipped into a small cup of urine. the background is a blue surface, and there is a bottle of urine test strips visible. the slide also contains text that explains the purpose of the test strips, stating that they are compared to known values on the bottle for reporting. the slide is from delmar cengage learning, as indicated by the logo in the bottom left corner.
